text:
Created attachment 148293
patch

Every LaTeX-compiling drops me this warning:

LaTeX Warning: Please use \usepackage[latin2]{inputenc} with
           \usepackage[magyar]{babel}.

I've asked it on stackexchange [1] and here is the answer in patch. With this patch works me well.


[1] http://tex.stackexchange.com/questions/205589/utf8-inputenc-vs-babel/205596#205596
